Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-29 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum-ranker shows SEDG and VPG as the top two performers, both passing all technical gates (above 30/50/100/200-day SMAs) and demonstrating strong short-term momentum. SEDG ranks #1 with a score of 96.6, driven by consistent gains across timeframes (4.32% in 1 day, 351.24% in 1 year) and exceptional performance relative to SPY and QQQ (322.53% and 308.96% outperformance over 1 year, respectively). VPG shows even more extreme returns (380.48% in 1 year) but displays a notable anomaly: an extremely high weekly-to-daily ratio of 426.77x, suggesting a spike event that could indicate either exceptional strength or elevated volatility risk. Both tickers maintain healthy resilience during down SPY days (bad_spy_scores of 2.04 and 3.29, respectively), though VPG's slightly higher score warrants attention. The data reflects a narrow set of top performers with exceptionally consistent multi-timeframe momentum, a pattern typical of strong secular trends rather than mean-reversion opportunities.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
